message:
test(escape-parser,vtparse,config): add 163 unit tests for color, esc, error, enums, keyassignment

Coverage expansion:
- escape-parser/color.rs: 2 → 37 tests (AnsiColor, RgbColor, ColorSpec)
- escape-parser/esc.rs: 1 → 47 tests (all EscCode variants, Unspecified, Display)
- escape-parser/error.rs: 0 → 17 tests (Error, InternalError, Context trait)
- vtparse/enums.rs: 0 → 11 tests (Action, State discriminants and traits)
- config/keyassignment.rs: 0 → 54 tests (LauncherFlags, SelectionMode, Pattern,
  SpawnTabDomain, PaneDirection, CharSelectGroup cycle, SpawnCommand, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
